title: Rocket
description: Vanilla+ experience, RPG-like gameplay, dark-themed GUI and more.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc2759627b33d43044b3181845bb5b970f6ebd4.gif) Just another modpack based on **Minecraft 1.20.1** and **Fabric**, which enhances your Vanilla Minecraft experience with new mods, (modpack only!) resource packs and shaders. Reworked [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) from [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel) now supports almost every single mod in this modpack! I tried to make true Vanilla+ experience and not to overhaul it with useless and boring mods, so go ahead and try it already! [](https://github.com/westahdusiwii/rocket) [](https://discord.gg/KScRA9Wr9x)
All mods: - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/zV5r3pPn) - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/3ufwT9JF) - [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/E6FUtRJh) - [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/defK2XM3) - Shaders included: - [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) - [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader) - [Noble](https://modrinth.com/shader/noble) - [Exposa Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/exposa-shaders)
Working on: - GUI Revision support for all added mods [90%] - Custom-made skill tree - Unique boss soundtracks - **More** optimisation - Perfect support for both EN/RU languages - ~~Survival based mods (player temperature or inventory weight)~~ [Done] And more!
